---
Static
---
!2 URN:NBN
Varje DiVA-output post har ett permanent ID av typen URN:NBN. Detta URN:NBN används som en stabil och långsiktig identifierare. När en ny DiVA-output post skapas utan att ett URN:NBN anges, ska systemet automatiskt generera ett nytt URN:NBN.
    Nya URN:NBN ska ha formatet: '''urn:nbn:se:diva-{id}'''  där {id} är postens DiVA-id.

Om man anger ett URN:NBN vid skapandet av en DiVA-output post ska systemet inte generera något nytt URN:NBN. Det angivna URN:NBN ska behållas exakt som det är. Detta gäller endast för äldre DiVA-output poster som skapats i classic system.

Ett URN:NBN är permanent och får aldrig ändras efter att posten har skapats. Det innebär att URN:NBN inte får uppdateras, ersättas eller tas bort på en befintlig DiVA-output post.

Mer information om URN:NBN finns här:
https://www.kb.se/pliktleverans-och-isbn/urnnbn/vad-ar-urnnbn.html

!3 Testfall
     * '''Case 1''': Skapa en DiVA-output post och ange urn:nbn manuellt → värdet ska behållas och inget nytt ska genereras.
     * '''Case 2''': Skapa en DiVA-output post och ange urn:nbn manuellt som redan finns → det skall inte gå att skapa posten.
     * '''Case 3''': Skapa en DiVA-output post utan urn:nbn → systemet ska generera ett nytt enligt formatet urn:nbn:se:diva-{id}.
     * '''Case 4''': Försök ändra urn:nbn på en existerande post → det ska inte vara möjligt (värdet ska förbli oförändrat).
     * '''Case 5''': Försök ta bort urn:nbn på en existerande post → det ska inte vara möjligt (värdet ska förbli oförändrat).
  
!***> Test setup
!define recordType {diva-output}
!define expectedCreateResult {CREATED}
!define divaOutputCreateUrnTemplate {!-{"name":"output","children":[{"name":"recordInfo","children":[{"name":"validationType","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"validationType"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"diva-output"}]},{"name":"dataDivider","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"system"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"divaPreview"}]},{"name":"permissionUnit","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"permissionUnit"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"fitnesse"}]},{"name":"visibility","value":"unpublished"}-!${urnnbnValue}!-]},{"name":"dataQuality","value":"2026"},{"name":"genre","value":"artistic-work_original-creative-work","attributes":{"type":"outputType"}},{"name":"language","repeatId":"0","children":[{"name":"languageTerm","value":"swe","attributes":{"type":"code","authority":"iso639-2b"}}]},{"name":"artisticWork","value":"true","attributes":{"type":"outputType"}},{"name":"note","attributes":{"type":"publicationStatus"},"value":"published"},{"name":"genre","value":"ref","attributes":{"type":"contentType"}},{"name":"titleInfo","children":[{"name":"title","value":"en title"}],"attributes":{"lang":"swe"}},{"name":"originInfo","children":[{"name":"dateIssued","children":[{"name":"year","value":"1982"}]}]},{"name":"classification","repeatId":"0","value":"1","attributes":{"authority":"ssif"}},{"name":"adminInfo","children":[{"name":"reviewed","value":"true"}]}]}-!}

!define divaOutputUpdateUrnTemplate {!-{"children":[{"children":[{"name":"ignoreOverwriteProtection","value":"true"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"validationType"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"diva-output"}],"name":"validationType"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"system"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"divaPreview"}],"name":"dataDivider"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"permissionUnit"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"fitnesse"}],"name":"permissionUnit"},{"name":"visibility","value":"unpublished"}-!${urnnbnValue}!-,{"name":"tsVisibility","value":"2026-03-30T14:35:23.218738Z"},{"name":"inTrashBin","value":"false"},{"name":"id","value":"145"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"recordType"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"diva-output"}],"name":"type"}],"name":"recordInfo"},{"name":"dataQuality","value":"2026"},{"name":"genre","attributes":{"type":"outputType"},"value":"artistic-work_original-creative-work"},{"repeatId":"0","children":[{"name":"languageTerm","attributes":{"authority":"iso639-2b","type":"code"},"value":"swe"}],"name":"language"},{"name":"artisticWork","attributes":{"type":"outputType"},"value":"true"},{"name":"note","attributes":{"type":"publicationStatus"},"value":"published"},{"name":"genre","attributes":{"type":"contentType"},"value":"ref"},{"children":[{"name":"title","value":"en title"}],"name":"titleInfo","attributes":{"lang":"swe"}},{"children":[{"children":[{"name":"year","value":"1982"}],"name":"dateIssued"}],"name":"originInfo"},{"repeatId":"0","name":"classification","attributes":{"authority":"ssif"},"value":"1"},{"children":[{"name":"reviewed","value":"true"}],"name":"adminInfo"}],"name":"output"}-!}
*!

!***> Case 1: Skapa en DiVA-output post och ange urn:nbn manuellt → värdet ska behållas och inget nytt ska genereras.

!define urnnbnValue {!-,{"name":"urn","value":"urn:nbn:se:fitnesse:diva-2200"}-!}

!| ChildComparerFixture |
| authToken | type | json | testCreateAndStoreRecord? | getStatusType? | getCreatedId? |
| $systemAdminAuthToken | ${recordType} | ${divaOutputCreateUrnTemplate} | | ${expectedCreateResult} | $recordIdWithUrn= |

!| ChildComparerFixture |
| children | testCheckContainWithValues? |
|  {"children":[{"children":[{"name": "id", "value": "$recordIdWithUrn"},{"name":"urn","value":"urn:nbn:se:fitnesse:diva-2200"}],"name":"recordInfo"}]} | OK |

*!

!***> Case 2: Skapa en DiVA-output post och ange urn:nbn manuellt som redan finns → det skall inte gå att skapa posten.

!define urnnbnValue {!-,{"name":"urn","value":"urn:nbn:se:fitnesse:diva-2200"}-!}

!| ChildComparerFixture |
| authToken | type | json | testCreateAndStoreRecord? | getStatusType? | 
| $systemAdminAuthToken | ${recordType} | ${divaOutputCreateUrnTemplate} |The record could not be created as it fails unique validation with the following 1 error messages: [A record matching the unique rule with [key: urn, value: urn:nbn:se:fitnesse:diva-2200] already exists in the system] | CONFLICT |

*!

!***> Case 3: Skapa en DiVA-output post utan urn:nbn → systemet ska generera ett nytt enligt formatet urn:nbn:se:diva-{id}.

#!define divaOutputWithoutUrn {${divaOutputUnpublished}}
!define urnnbnValue {}

!| ChildComparerFixture |
| authToken | type | json | testCreateAndStoreRecord? | getStatusType? | getCreatedId? |
| $systemAdminAuthToken | ${recordType} | ${divaOutputCreateUrnTemplate} | | ${expectedCreateResult} | $recordIdWithoutUrn= |

!| ChildComparerFixture |
| children | testCheckContainWithValues? |
|  {"children":[{"children":[{"name": "id", "value": "$recordIdWithoutUrn"},{"name":"urn","value":"urn:nbn:se:diva-$recordIdWithoutUrn"}],"name":"recordInfo"}]} | OK |

*!

!***> Case 4: Försök ändra urn:nbn på en existerande post → det ska inte vara möjligt (värdet ska förbli oförändrat).
!define urnnbnValue {!-,{"name":"urn","value":"urn:nbn:se:diva-1"}-!}

!| ChildComparerFixture |
| authToken | type | id | json | testUpdateAndStoreRecord? | getStatusType? | 
| $systemAdminAuthToken | ${recordType} | $recordIdWithoutUrn | ${divaOutputUpdateUrnTemplate} |  | OK | 

!| ChildComparerFixture |
| children | testCheckContainWithValues? |
|  {"children":[{"children":[{"name": "id", "value": "$recordIdWithoutUrn"},{"name":"urn","value":"urn:nbn:se:diva-$recordIdWithoutUrn"}],"name":"recordInfo"}]} | OK |

*!

!***> Case 5: Försök ta bort urn:nbn på en existerande post → det ska inte vara möjligt (värdet ska förbli oförändrat).
!define urnnbnValue {}

!| ChildComparerFixture |
| authToken | type | id | json | testUpdateAndStoreRecord? | getStatusType? | 
| $systemAdminAuthToken | ${recordType} | $recordIdWithoutUrn | ${divaOutputUpdateUrnTemplate} |  | OK | 

!| ChildComparerFixture |
| children | testCheckContainWithValues? |
|  {"children":[{"children":[{"name": "id", "value": "$recordIdWithoutUrn"},{"name":"urn","value":"urn:nbn:se:diva-$recordIdWithoutUrn"}],"name":"recordInfo"}]} | OK |

*!

!***> Clean up
!| RecordEndpointFixture |
|authToken|type|id|testDeleteRecord?|getStatusType?|
|$systemAdminAuthToken|diva-output|$recordIdWithUrn    | | OK | 
|$systemAdminAuthToken|diva-output|$recordIdWithoutUrn | | OK |
*!
